tasks.title: Prerequisites, secrets, hackathon evidence, and two-computer control
tasks.description: Bootstrap both machines, validate coordination, verify providers, and preserve sanitized Hermes evidence.

tasks.title: Supported monorepo, contracts, Firebase, and tests
tasks.description: Create the supported application foundation and typed data/security boundaries.

tasks.title: Bilingual marketing, waitlist, invitations, and launch gate
tasks.description: Ship the public launch surface and stop for explicit user approval.

tasks.title: Invitation-gated authentication, shells, and media security
tasks.description: Create separate role accounts, secure sessions, app shells, and private media authorization.

tasks.title: Jick creator onboarding and private media
tasks.description: Build bilingual voice/text creator onboarding, editable profiles, recordings, transcripts, deletion, and export.

tasks.title: Jall brand profile and campaign onboarding
tasks.description: Build bilingual brand onboarding and editable campaign briefs.

tasks.title: Superlinked matching, consent, inbox, and chat
tasks.description: Rank registered creators deterministically, gate disclosure by consent, and open authorized conversations.

tasks.title: Offers, delivery, Stripe, and intervention
tasks.description: Complete a versioned offer, test-mode payment, delivery, approval, payout, and manual exception path.

tasks.title: Development, staging, and production-safe testing guide
tasks.description: Make every major capability reproducibly testable without unsafe production mutations.

steps.title: Delivery controls
steps.description: Pin the workspace, validate state, and define bilingual content and asset contracts.

steps.title: Credentials, providers, and Hermes
steps.description: Verify redacted provider connectivity on both machines and preserve hackathon evidence.

steps.title: Application workspace
steps.description: Create the monorepo and bilingual Next.js foundation.

steps.title: Contracts and Firebase foundation
steps.description: Create shared schemas, emulators, rules, fakes, and fixtures.

steps.title: Typed persistence
steps.description: Create session helpers and the typed Firestore repository layer.

steps.title: Public experience
steps.description: Create the warm bilingual marketing surface.

steps.title: Waitlist and invitations
steps.description: Capture low-friction entries and approve them manually.

steps.title: Launch acceptance
steps.description: Verify and deploy the waitlist candidate before human approval.

steps.title: Identity
steps.description: Consume invitations and create immutable role sessions.

steps.title: Authenticated surface
steps.description: Create separate role shells and owner-scoped media access.

steps.title: Voice and orchestration platform
steps.description: Create typed provider clients and Jick persistence APIs.

steps.title: Creator experience
steps.description: Create voice/text onboarding, profile editing, playback, deletion, and export.

steps.title: Jall platform
steps.description: Extract and persist brand profiles and campaign briefs.

steps.title: Brand experience
steps.description: Create mobile bilingual intake and review/publish screens.

steps.title: Matching and disclosure
steps.description: Combine semantic signals with deterministic ranking and consent.

steps.title: Conversations
steps.description: Create authorized inbox and real-time chat.

steps.title: Offers and deal state
steps.description: Version terms and record mutual acceptance in an append-only state machine.

steps.title: Stripe funding and payout ledger
steps.description: Create Checkout, webhooks, and reconciliation after Connect readiness is already enforced by T7.1.

steps.title: Delivery and controlled intervention
steps.description: Handle delivery, revision, dispute, payout, refund, and reversal operations.

steps.title: Guide contract
steps.description: Define and validate the required structure for every manual test.

steps.title: Capability guides
steps.description: Document and exercise product, service, payment, and security journeys.

steps.title: Devices and environment safety
steps.description: Cover browser/accessibility recovery and safe production operations.

G2.WAITLIST_APPROVAL.description: The user approves the deployed English and Spanish waitlist on desktop and mobile.

G8.LIVE_PAYMENT_ACTIVATION.description: A human separately authorizes real-money Stripe activation after terms and operations are ready.
